channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ADCOUNTY] Adcounty Media Appoints Kumar Saurav & Prateek Bhansali as Directors
item.description:
Adcounty Media India Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 28, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Kumar Saurav (DIN: 09443543) as an Additional Director (Executive) and Whole-Time Director for five years. Concurrently, Mr. Prateek Bhansali (DIN: 10168425) was appointed as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Independent Director) for a similar five-year term. Both appointments are effective April 28, 2026, and are subject to shareholder approval, which will be sought through a Postal Ballot. The company confirmed that neither appointee is debarred from holding a directorship by SEBI or any other authority.

  • Board appointed Kumar Saurav as Whole-Time Director for 5 years.
  • Prateek Bhansali appointed as Independent Director for 5 years.
  • Appointments effective April 28, 2026, pending shareholder approval.
  • Both directors confirmed not debarred by SEBI or other authorities.
  • Shareholder approval to be sought via Postal Ballot process.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adcounty Media India Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NECLIFE] Nectar Lifesciences Extends Slump Sale Completion to July 31, 2026
item.description:
Nectar Lifesciences Ltd has announced an update regarding the previously disclosed slump sale of its business. The company and the purchaser, Capnest Health Care Private Limited, have mutually agreed to extend the completion date for this slump sale. The new expected completion date is now on or before July 31, 2026. All other relevant disclosures pertaining to the slump sale, as initially provided in the December 20, 2025 letter, remain unchanged.

  • Nectar Lifesciences extended its business slump sale deadline.
  • New completion date is set for on or before July 31, 2026.
  • The purchaser for the slump sale is Capnest Health Care Private Limited.
  • All other terms and disclosures of the original slump sale remain unchanged.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NECTAR LIFESCIENCES LTD. | Category: Divestment

item.title: [NATFIT] National Fittings: No Current Defaults on Bank of India Loans
item.description:
National Fittings Ltd has submitted disclosures regarding its loan obligations from Bank of India. The company confirmed that there are currently no defaults on payment of interest or repayment of principal amount for its loans, which include WC Term Loan, Packing Credit, and Foreign Bill Purchase (FBP/FBN). The total outstanding amount from Bank of India is ₹9.32 Crores. A WC Term Loan of ₹0.31 Crore is part of this, subsisting until November 30, 2026, with an interest rate of 7.5%.

  • National Fittings reports no current defaults on loan payments.
  • Total outstanding loan from Bank of India is ₹9.32 Crores.
  • Obligations include WC Term Loan, Packing Credit, and FBP/FBN.
  • WC Term Loan of ₹0.31 Cr is active until Nov 2026 at 7.5% interest.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Fittings Limited | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [SJS] SJS Board to meet May 5 for Q4/FY26 results & final dividend
item.description:
S.J.S. Enterprises Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for May 05, 2026, at 02:00 pm IST. The agenda includes considering and approving the audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also consider and recommend a final dividend, if any, for the same financial year. The trading window for designated persons is closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the results declaration. An Investor/Analyst/Earnings Call is scheduled for May 06, 2026, at 12:00 pm IST to discuss the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 05, 2026, to approve Q4/FY26 financial results.
  • Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q4 and FY26 to be considered.
  • Board to consider and recommend a final dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours post-results declaration.
  • Earnings call to discuss results scheduled for May 06, 2026, at 12:00 pm IST.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: S.J.S. Enterprises Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [EFCIL] EFC (I) Ltd Board to finalize ₹160 Cr Rights Issue terms on May 1, 2026
item.description:
EFC (I) Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for May 1, 2026, to finalize the specific terms of its previously approved Rights Issue. The Board had earlier sanctioned an offer and issuance of fully paid-up equity shares, not exceeding ₹160 crore, via a rights issue. The company has already secured in-principle approvals from both BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited on April 27, 2026. The upcoming meeting will focus on determining crucial aspects such as the Rights Issue price, overall issue size, rights entitlement ratio, the record date, and the timing of the Rights Issue, along with other related matters.

  • Board meeting on May 1, 2026, to finalize Rights Issue terms.
  • Rights Issue previously approved for up to ₹160 crore.
  • In-principle approvals received from BSE and NSE.
  • Meeting to determine issue price, size, ratio, and record date.
  • This is a significant step towards the capital raise.
  • The company website has the intimation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EFC (I) Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SRMENERGY] SRM Energy Appoints Jitendra Patil as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
item.description:
SRM Energy Ltd's Board of Directors, at a meeting on April 28, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Jitendra Rajendra Patil as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective May 1, 2026. Mr. Patil will also serve as a Key Managerial Personnel and part of the Senior Management. He is a qualified Company Secretary with over 6 years of professional experience in corporate laws, secretarial compliances, accounting, auditing, and taxation, particularly with listed companies. He is not related to any director of the company.

  • SRM Energy's Board approved a change in Key Managerial Personnel.
  • Mr. Jitendra Rajendra Patil appointed as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.
  • The appointment is effective from May 1, 2026.
  • Mr. Patil has over 6 years of experience in corporate law and compliance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SRM ENERGY LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SIGNPOST] Signpost India launches 'Saksham Niveshak' for unclaimed dividends
item.description:
Signpost India Ltd has launched the "Saksham Niveshak" campaign from April 1, 2026, to July 9, 2026. This initiative, prompted by the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (IEPFA), Ministry of Corporate Affairs, aims to raise awareness among shareholders to update their KYC details and claim any unpaid or unclaimed dividends/shares. The campaign seeks to prevent these assets from being transferred to the IEPF. Shareholders are advised to ensure their bank account and KYC details are updated, as dividends are paid electronically. Detailed instructions for updating information for both demat and physical shareholders, along with contact details for assistance, are available on the company's website.

  • Company launches "Saksham Niveshak" campaign from April 1 to July 9, 2026.
  • Initiative aims to help shareholders claim unpaid/unclaimed dividends and shares.
  • Shareholders must update KYC and bank details to receive payments.
  • Unclaimed dividends/shares will transfer to IEPF after seven years.
  • Campaign is in response to IEPF Authority, Ministry of Corporate Affairs initiative.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Signpost India Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [AWL] AWL Agri Board Approves FY26 Results, Recommends Dividend, Re-appoints Director
item.description:
AWL Agri Business Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 28, 2026, approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion from statutory auditors. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹1 per equity share for FY 2025-26, setting June 19, 2026, as the record date. Additionally, the 28th Annual General Meeting is scheduled for July 7, 2026. The Board also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Ravindra Kumar Singh as Whole Time Director for a three-year term starting November 1, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Mr. Singh has over 35 years of experience in the oil and food business.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹1 per equity share for FY26.
  • Fixed June 19, 2026, as the record date for the dividend.
  • Re-appointed Mr. Ravindra Kumar Singh as Whole Time Director for 3 years.
  • 28th Annual General Meeting to be held on July 7, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adani Wilmar Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FEDFINA] Fedbank Financial Services Q4 FY26 PAT up 40.3% to ₹100.52 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fedbank Financial Services Limited announced its financial and operational performance for Q4 FY26 and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, Profit After Tax (PAT) increased by 40.3% year-on-year to ₹100.52 Cr, while Net Interest Income (NII) grew 23.1% YoY to ₹348.8 Cr. The company's Asset Under Management (AUM) rose 27.5% YoY to ₹20,153 Cr, and disbursements for the quarter surged 109.1% YoY to ₹11,665 Cr. Asset quality showed improvement with Gross Stage III and Net Stage III decreasing QoQ to 1.9% and 1.3% respectively. The branch network expanded to 757 across 17 states and union territories.

  • Q4 FY26 PAT increased 40.3% YoY to ₹100.52 Cr.
  • Net Interest Income grew 23.1% YoY to ₹348.8 Cr in Q4 FY26.
  • AUM expanded 27.5% YoY to ₹20,153 Cr by Q4 FY26 end.
  • Disbursements for Q4 FY26 surged 109.1% YoY to ₹11,665 Cr.
  • Gross Stage III and Net Stage III improved to 1.9% and 1.3% respectively.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SPML] SPML Board Appoints Secretarial & Internal Auditors, Authorizes KMP
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Speciality Medicines Ltd (SPML) met on April 28, 2026, and approved several key items. These include the appointment of M/s. Hardik Jetani & Associates as Secretarial Auditor for FY 2025-26 and M/s. Rahul Mistri and Co. as Internal Auditor for three financial years from FY 2025-26 to FY 2027-28. Additionally, the Board authorized Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) to determine the materiality of events and make disclosures to stock exchanges as per Regulation 30(5) of SEBI Listing Regulations. The Board also reviewed and acknowledged the Audit Committee's recommendations and approvals regarding related party transactions.

  • Board appointed M/s. Hardik Jetani & Associates as Secretarial Auditor for FY25-26.
  • M/s. Rahul Mistri and Co. appointed as Internal Auditor for FY25-26 to FY27-28.
  • Key Managerial Personnel authorized for materiality determination and disclosures.
  • Board reviewed Audit Committee's related party transaction recommendations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Speciality Medicines Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
